name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
Left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State definitions *)
Thinking == 0
Hungry == 1
Eating == 2

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]  (* 0 means fork is free *)
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> Thinking]

(* Next state *)
Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = Thinking
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = Hungry]
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = Hungry
          /\ forks[Left(i)] = 0
          /\ forks[Right(i)] = 0
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = i, ![Right(i)] = i]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = Eating]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = Eating
          /\ forks[Left(i)] = i
          /\ forks[Right(i)] = i
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = 0, ![Right(i)] = 0]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = Thinking]

(* Invariant: No two philosophers share a fork *)
TypeOK == /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] \in 0..N
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] = 0 \/ forks[i] \in 1..N
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] = 0 \/ forks[i] = i
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] = 0 \/ forks[i] = Left(i) \/ forks[i] = Right(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ flag[i] = FALSE
        /\ LET maxNum == Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})
           IN flag[i] = TRUE
        /\ LET newNum == maxNum + 1
           IN num[i] = newNum
        /\ flag[i] = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K
VARIABLES q, head, tail

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1

Next == 
  \/ /\ head = tail
     /\ tail = K
        /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head' = 1
        /\ tail' = 1
        /\ q' = <<>>
     \/ /\ tail < K
        /\ head' = head
        /\ tail' = tail + 1
        /\ q' = Append(q, 1)
     \/ /\ head < K
        /\ head' = head + 1
        /\ tail' = tail
        /\ q' = Tail(q)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = {}
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == 
  \/ /\ state = "Follower"
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
     /\ votedFor' = votedFor
     /\ state' = "Follower"
  \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
     /\ votedFor' = {currentTerm'}
     /\ state' = "Candidate"
  \/ /\ state = "Leader"
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
     /\ votedFor' = votedFor
     /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Seq(1..10) : /\ r \in readers
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
             /\ readers' = Remove(readers, r)

       \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \A r \in readers : r \notin Seq(1..10)
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
             /\ readers' = <<>>

       \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ \A r \in readers : r \notin Seq(1..10)
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
             /\ readers' = <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES token, messages

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ messages \in 1..N -> 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ messages' \in 1..N -> 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
           /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = token THEN token' ELSE messages[i]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, messages>>

VARIABLES store

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
Next == /\ store' \in [Keys -> Values]
      /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY

VARIABLES file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, channel

Init ==
    /\ file = <<>>
    /\ chunks = <<>>
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = <<>>
    /\ channel = <<>>

Next ==
    \/ \E chunk \in Seq(1..CHUNK_SIZE) :
        /\ chunk \in chunks
        /\ \E i \in 1..Len(chunks) : /\ chunks[i] = chunk
        /\ \E i \in 1..Len(sentChunks) : /\ sentChunks[i] = chunk
        /\ \E i \in 1..Len(retransmitCount) : /\ retransmitCount[i] = 0
        /\ channel = Append(channel, chunk)
    \/ \E i \in 1..Len(chunks) :
        /\ chunks[i] \notin sentChunks
        /\ \E j \in 1..Len(sentChunks) : /\ sentChunks[j] = chunks[i]
        /\ \E k \in 1..Len(retransmitCount) : /\ retransmitCount[k] = 0
        /\ channel = Append(channel, chunks[i])
    \/ \E i \in 1..Len(chunks) :
        /\ chunks[i] \in sentChunks
        /\ \E j \in 1..Len(retransmitCount) : /\ retransmitCount[j] < MAX_RETRIES
        /\ \E k \in 1..Len(retransmitCount) : /\ retransmitCount[k] = retransmitCount[k] + 1
        /\ channel = Append(channel, chunks[i])
    \/ \E i \in 1..Len(chunks) :
        /\ chunks[i] \in sentChunks
        /\ \E j \in 1..Len(retransmitCount) : /\ retransmitCount[j] = MAX_RETRIES
        /\ channel = <<>>
    \/ \E i \in 1..Len(chunks) :
        /\ chunks[i] \in sentChunks
        /\ \E j \in 1..Len(retransmitCount) : /\ retransmitCount[j] = MAX_RETRIES
        /\ channel = <<>>

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, channel>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ clocks[i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]
        /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ offsets[i] = offsets[i] + \E j \in 1..N : (clocks[j] - clocks[i]) \div N
        /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ clocks[i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]
        /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ offsets[i] = offsets[i] + \E j \in 1..N : (clocks[j] - clocks[i]) \div N

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = flag
          /\ turn' = turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

Next == /\ known' = known
      /\ infected' = Append(infected, known)

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Clients

VARIABLE free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Clients:
          /\ \E p \in free:
            /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
            /\ free' = free \ {p}
        \/ \E c \in Clients:
          /\ \E p \in allocated[c]:
            /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
            /\ free' = free \cup {p}
        \/ free' = free
        /\ allocated' = allocated

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> 0]

Next == \/ /\ turn' = 1 - turn
          /\ wants' = [i \in {0,1} |-> IF i = turn THEN 1 ELSE 0]
        \/ /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = [i \in {0,1} |-> IF i = turn THEN 0 ELSE wants[i]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>
